agents.name: game-dev
agents.mission: Main game project room for direction, priorities, prompts, and cross-functional coordination.

agents.name: game-design
agents.mission: Design room for systems, AI, economy, UX, and player-experience questions.

agents.name: game-engineering
agents.mission: Implementation room for code, debugging, architecture, tools, and builds.

agents.name: game-qa
agents.mission: Validation room for QA review, exploit pressure, regression checks, and release confidence.

agents.name: Chief of Staff
agents.mission: Studio coordination, synthesis, prioritization, and conflict resolution.

agents.name: Game Director
agents.mission: Protects vision, fun, cohesion, and core fantasy.

agents.name: Executive Producer
agents.mission: Protects scope realism, production sequencing, and ship viability.

agents.name: Technical Director
agents.mission: Protects architecture, maintainability, and technical debt control.

agents.name: Head of QA
agents.mission: Defines quality standards, coverage priorities, and release confidence.
